item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 031000Z AUTO 22007KT 190V250 9999 BKN012/// OVC018/// ///CB 17/14 Q1012 TEMPO 4000 SHRA BKN030TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 030500Z 0306/0406 20006KT 9999 SCT050 TEMPO 0306/0311 -RA BKN014 PROB40 TEMPO 0306/0311 4000 -RA BKN006 PROB30 TEMPO 0306/0311 BKN004 TEMPO 0311/0319 4000 SHRA BKN030TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0312/0319 TSRA BKN030CB PROB40 TEMPO 0402/0406 4000 -SHRA BKN040TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0404/0406 BKN006 BKN030
